title: parosela cylindrica
intro: Parosela cylindrica is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family, and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Parosela cylindrica include the treatment of fever, wounds, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Parosela cylindrica is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses, and can also be found in some traditional herbal remedies.
